title: OT Digital Twin
tagline: Real-time industrial digital twin for geothermal plant operations
problem: No affordable remote monitoring solution for industrial OT environments in East Africa. Engineers fly to sites to read meters.
solution: Solo deployment of IBM Maximo Application Suite 9.1 on a 6-node OpenShift ROKS cluster (Frankfurt region). Monte Carlo failure prediction, LSTM anomaly detection, Unity XR visualisation layer.
impact: Presented at EAAAIW 2026 (CUEA). Validated by an Oil & Gas engineer. 30% PoC pathway to IBM Research Africa identified.
